description_long: This is a dual-compartment postbox commonly found in urban environments, featuring two adjacent rectangular boxes mounted on sturdy metal posts. The left compartment is painted green and labeled for local or outgoing mail, while the right compartment is red and designated for airmail or express services. Both compartments have horizontal rectangular mail slots near the top of the front face, with clear white text and postal insignia above and below the slots. The base consists of two separate metal posts, each anchored to a concrete pad, providing stability and separation for the compartments. Informational panels and collection times are visible below the mail slots, and the overall structure is robust, designed to withstand outdoor conditions. The surface shows signs of weathering, with some paint wear and minor surface irregularities.
description: A dual-compartment urban postbox with green and red sections, each featuring a horizontal mail slot, postal insignia, and collection information on the front. The postbox is mounted on two metal posts anchored to a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both green and red compartments, with mail slots, postal insignia, and collection times panels clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the compartments and the separation between the two metal posts, with less detail visible on the surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of both compartments, with some text visible on the green compartment and the supporting posts and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the green compartment's side panel and the structure of the supporting post and base.
attribute_mail_slot_location: centered on the front face near the top of each compartment
attribute_collection_times_panel: rectangular panel below each mail slot on the front face, displaying collection times and information
attribute_postal_service_logo: painted circular postal insignia on the front of each compartment, below the mail slot
attribute_door_or_access_panel: large rectangular door on the rear of each compartment for mail retrieval
attribute_posting_aperture_design: horizontal rectangular slot with straight edges
